# External Data
This directory contains external data files required for the simulation.

## Required Files
- `Fe_Cr_Mendelev_2003.eam.fs`: The NIST EAM potential for Fe-Cr.

## Download Instructions
The potential can be downloaded from the NIST Interatomic Potentials Repository.
URL: https://www.ctcms.nist.gov/potentials/
Search for "Fe-Cr" and download the Mendelev 2003 potential.

Place the file in this directory with the exact name `Fe_Cr_Mendelev_2003.eam.fs`.
